ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "mark" INTEGER /* User rating of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "seria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the book belongs to */,
  "num_in_seria" INTEGER /* Number of the book in the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_seria_id FOREIGN KEY ("seria_id") REFERENCES series ("seria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "seria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "seria_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, author, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_book_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being read */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is reading the book */,
  "pages_read" INTEGER /* Number of pages read by the user */,
  "last_read_date" TEXT /* Date the user last read the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_progress_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translator" TEXT /* Name of the translator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the edition */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the edition */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
